title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd!
